description: Rascal is a traditional handmade phinisi yacht built in 2015 in Sulawesi, Indonesia. Measuring 30m overall, she accommodates up to 10 guests across 5 cabins and 4 spacious common areas. With an interior that evokes a laid-back luxe vibe reminiscent of the Hamptons, Rascal feels like a spacious floating villa.

crew.name: Fareez Ahmad
crew.bio:
most likely to:
Show you something super cool underwater, play a board
game with you or ask you interesting questions.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA:
“Komodo and Raja Ampat, which is why they are my areas
of expertise!”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“Meeting folks from all over the globe and hearing their
stories… the world comes to me!”

crew.name: Abdullah Farham
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Show you the thrill of sailing a phinisi yacht like a pro.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“The area I like the most is Raja Ampat, especially Wayag.  I’ve never seen a landscape as beautiful as Wayag.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“I love exploring many new areas that I never thought of before.”

crew.name: Ahmad Jais
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Impress you with his dancing skills. 
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“Komodo is my favorite for the best sailing conditions, easy anchorage, and less overnight travel.”
 WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“I enjoy showing guests traditional fishing methods outside of marine parks, and I love the challenge of fixing a broken wooden chair at the last minute.”

crew.name: Basri
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Give you an adrenaline rush when he takes you towed tubing at full throttle.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“I love Raja Ampat because the trips are longer, giving more time to enjoy the daily activities and stunning landscapes.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:
“I enjoy taking people to and from dive sites, making sure they’re dropped in the best spots with the most fish, and then 
hearing about their dive afterward. Rascal is my favorite boat I’ve worked on.”

crew.name: Firmansyah
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Ask you to tell jokes so he can practice their English.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“Komodo is my favorite because of the many islands, excellent sailing conditions, and the ease of finding 
spare parts.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“Working on Rascal feels like being on a permanent holiday, and I love joining guests for snorkeling.”

crew.name: Gersan Arisonal
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Cry when guests leave.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“My favorite area is Komodo National Park because it’s easy to find spare parts in Labuan Bajo.”
 WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“What I enjoy most about my job is the opportunity to visit new places I’ve never been to before.”

crew.name: Duma Kailung
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Tell you stories after dark about Indonesia’s nature spirits.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“There’s nothing quite like Komodo season, the sunsets are simply magical.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
I love everything about Rascal, especially joining treks and practicing English with the guests.”

crew.name: I Gst Ngurah Jelantik Adnyana
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Serenade you with his beautiful voice during our dinner under the stars.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“I love the Ring of Fire for the chance to explore various parts of Indonesia and its diverse islands”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB: 
“What I love most about my job is making people happy with the food I prepare and always learning something 
new from the guests.”

crew.name: I Andre
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO: 
Make you the best Nasi Goreng anywhere in Indonesia.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“I love Raja Ampat the most because of the countless different snorkeling spots.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“I love getting creative with plating and making many different Indonesian sambals.”

crew.name: Jumadin
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Leave you extra home-baked cookies in your cabin.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“I love the Ring of Fire because I can visit my wife and daughter and bring guests to say hello. I also enjoy helping 
to find the best quality local honey.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“I’m all for trekking, especially on the Komodo trek and Pindito in Raja Ampat.”

crew.name: I Komang Adiatma Wisesa
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO:
Surprise you with his amazing magic skills.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“Labuan Bajo and Raja Ampat. I love both equally because each has unique qualities.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“What I like most is that it makes both me and others happy. I love my job because it includes my hobbies of drawing, 
experimenting with new ideas, creating favorite drinks, learning magic tricks, and connecting with new people to 
share experiences.”

crew.name: Fahrul Lantemona
crew.bio:
MOST LIKELY TO: 
Take you spearfishing so you can catch then cook the freshest barbecue lunch.
FAVOURITE CRUISING AREA: 
“Raja Ampat and Komodo are my favorite spots because of their exceptional underwater marine life, perfect for diving 
and sailing.”
WHAT I LOVE MOST ABOUT MY JOB:  
“I’m excited about undertaking Dive Master training in 2024 and ready for all the underwater adventures that lie ahead.”
